zh.lifeSummary: 當Errick MacDhonnchad於大約1200年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的母親Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick0歲，父親Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe2歲。她於1229年與Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1280年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年81歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Errick MacDhonnchad于大约1200年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的母亲Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick0岁，父亲Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe2岁。她于1229年与Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1280年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍享年81岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Errick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Derek
meanings: From a Low German or Dutch form of Theodoric ( see Terry ), introduced into Britain during the Middle Ages by Flemish weavers, although it was not much used until a sudden explosion of popularity in the mid 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Errick MacDhonnchad was born about 1200, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her mother, Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick, was 0 and her father, Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, was 2. She married Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow in 1229, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1280, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Errick MacDhonnchad est née environ 1200, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, sa mère, Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick, avait 0 ans et son père, Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, avait 2 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow en 1229, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Kilchrenan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Icolmkill, Argyll, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Errick MacDhonnchad um 1200 in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick 0 und ihr Vater Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe 2. Sie hat 1229 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Errick MacDhonnchad è nata il circa 1200 nel Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua madre, Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick, aveva 0 anni e sua padre, Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, aveva 2 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow nel 1229, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1280, nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Errick MacDhonnchadが約1200年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，母Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrickは0歳，父Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochaweは2歳であった。1229年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウでSir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1280年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで81歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Errick MacDhonnchad(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick(은)는 0세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe(은)는 2세였다. 그녀는 1229년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아베에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Errick MacDhonnchad nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, sua mãe, Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick, tinha 0 anos e seu pai, Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, tinha 2 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow em 1229, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1280, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.

ro.Icolmkill, Argyll, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Errick MacDhonnchad родилась около 1200 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её матери по имени Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick было 0 лет, а отцу, которого звали Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, 2. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow в 1229 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности килчренан, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Errick MacDhonnchad nació aproximadamente 1200, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su mamá, Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick, tenía 0 años y su papá, Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe, tenía 2 años. Se casó con Sir Gillespic Campbell 1st Lord Of Menstrie 9th Knight Of Lochow en 1229, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1280, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Kilchrenan, Argyll, Scotland.
